headline: More Than $650 Million Offered as SCE Continues Relief for Community Members Impacted by Eaton Fire
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., June 04, 2026--Southern California Edison today announced that relief efforts for community members impacted by the Eaton Fire continue to advance, with over $650 million offered through the Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program. More than 70% of offers have been accepted, with additional decisions pending, as more participants move from claims to compensation.

headline: Why Is PSEG (PEG) Down 2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: PSEG (PEG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
